title: LLM prompt injection: user code unescaped in wiki prompts
detail: User-supplied code and comments from indexed repositories embedded directly into LLM prompts via string replacement. No tokenization, escaping, or isolation. Malicious code comments could manipulate wiki generation.

title: Git credential leakage via inherited subprocess env
detail: spawn('git', args, { env: {...process.env} }) inherits full process environment including GITHUB_TOKEN and SSH keys. Malicious repos with git hooks could exfiltrate credentials.

title: No dependency scanning in CI
detail: CI pipeline lacks npm audit, Snyk, or SBOM despite 20+ tree-sitter parsers and complex deps (onnxruntime-node, @huggingface/transformers). No CVE enforcement before npm publish.

title: Strong SSRF/URL validation
detail: URL validation in git-clone.ts checks private IP ranges, cloud metadata hostnames, IPv6 private blocks, numeric IP encodings. Above-average for a CLI tool.

title: DOMPurify on output
detail: Mermaid diagrams and HTML output sanitized with DOMPurify.

title: Typed DAG phase pipeline
detail: 12-phase ingestion pipeline with explicit deps[], typed execute(ctx, deps), and typed output. Cycles validated at startup. Adding a phase is a new file + buildPhaseList() registration.

title: npm workspaces monorepo (no lerna/nx)
detail: CLI (published npm package), Web UI (Vercel), and plugins (static config) as workspaces. No monorepo orchestrator overhead.

title: Zero-server WASM client-side pipeline
detail: Full indexing (tree-sitter parsing, LadybugDB/KuzuDB graph, Leiden clustering) runs in browser. Optional bridge to local CLI server for large repos.

title: Graph RAG Agent via LangChain ReAct
detail: 7 tools (search, cypher, grep, read, overview, explore, impact). Hybrid BM25 + semantic retrieval fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

title: Tool definition duplication across transports
detail: Tools defined once in tool_registry.py but surfaced via MCP + HTTP + CLI with some redundancy.

title: No incremental re-indexing documented
detail: All examples assume full re-index. ROADMAP lists incremental but not implemented.

title: Excellent methodological docs
detail: README 603L, ARCHITECTURE 181L, AGENTS 205L, CLAUDE ~120L, GUARDRAILS 89L. Write-heavy, layered, deeply practical.

title: Signs pattern in GUARDRAILS
detail: Recurring failures codified as rules once observed twice (stale graph, embeddings vanished, wrong repo in multi-repo).

title: superpowers plan format (TDD-first executable spec)
detail: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-02-pr626-high-fixes.md — 725-line structured plan: failing test → verify fail → implement → verify pass → commit template. Checkboxes tracked per step.

title: Marketplace distribution live
detail: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json + gitnexus-claude-plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (v1.3.6). Ships as Claude Code marketplace plugin.

title: Enterprise/self-hosted docs vestigial
detail: akonlabs.com referenced but no runbook for multi-tenant isolation, audit logging, secret management.

title: 211 test files across Vitest, Playwright, Pytest
detail: Unit, integration, E2E. Multi-platform CI (ubuntu/macOS/Windows). Coverage thresholds auto-ratchet (26%+ statements).

title: SWE-bench eval harness with 3 modes
detail: baseline / native / native_augment. Measures agent capability gain from code intelligence. Docker-based per-instance isolation; eval-server daemon ~100ms tool calls vs 5-10s cold CLI. Multi-model (Claude, GLM, MiniMax).

title: Grep augmentation mode mirrors Claude Code
detail: native_augment mode wraps grep results with graph context — precisely mirrors what Claude Code's PreToolUse hook does.

title: Pre-commit enforces TS + formatting
detail: Husky pre-commit hooks. TypeScript check + prettier.
